note: One real layer-18 standard-SAE feature. x = cosine of a token's residual to the feature direction; y = ‖residual‖. The feature aligns with descriptive verbs (high cosine, low norm). It keeps its top-5 by ‖x‖^a·cos. At a=0 (cosine) / the learned a≈0.26 it keeps the verbs; at a=1 (inner product) high-norm nouns it aligns with less (computing, learning, rain) crowd in. Values via experiments/modal_app.py::build_fig1.
